title: Squirrel Removal in Irvington, NJ | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Irvington, NJ. Humane trapping, exclusion, and attic restoration. Licensed experts serving Irvington homes and businesses. Call today!
intro: Squirrels are a common nuisance in Irvington, NJ, where older homes and tree-lined streets provide ideal conditions for these agile rodents to invade attics and crawl spaces. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Irvington, including humane trapping, entry point exclusion, and damage repair. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges faced by Irvington property owners and deliver effective, long-lasting solutions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Irvington and the surrounding New Jersey communities for years, earning a reputation for reliable, humane squirrel removal. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to safely remove squirrels and prevent future infestations, all backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Irvington's historic homes and mature tree canopy create perfect conditions for squirrel activity, particularly in neighborhoods near Irvington Park and around the Springfield Avenue corridor. From Victorian-era residences to multi-family properties, our team has the expertise to handle squirrel problems in all of Irvington's diverse building types.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Irvington, NJ?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Irvington typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes inspection, humane trapping, exclusion work, and cleanup. We provide free estimates for all Irvington properties.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Irvington homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter Irvington homes through roof vents, soffit gaps, chimney openings, and damaged fascia boards. Overhanging tree branches provide easy access to roofs, especially in Irvington's tree-dense neighborhoods. Our technicians identify and seal all entry points to prevent re-entry.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal services humane in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, ethical squirrel removal methods in compliance with New Jersey wildlife regulations. We use live traps and one-way exclusion devices that allow squirrels to leave but not return, then safely relocate them away from your Irvington property.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to Irvington homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause significant damage to Irvington homes by chewing through electrical wiring, insulation, and wooden structures. They also leave droppings and urine that create health hazards and odors. Our service includes damage assessment and attic restoration to return your home to its pre-infestation condition.
